context: The 2025 Circle Chart year-end was topped by WOODZ's 'Drowning' with 687 million weighted points. The chart reflected K-pop's global momentum alongside a strong domestic ballad tradition, with G-Dragon's long-awaited comeback featuring Big Bang members and Rosé's collaboration 'APT.' with Bruno Mars both charting prominently.

tracks.title: IF I SAY, I LOVE YOU
